title: Tool Template Change Risk Audit — Jun 10-11, 2026

jun_10.title_change: Old: '$X Mortgage Calculator 2026 — Free Monthly Payment Estimate' → New: '$X Mortgage: Y% Z-Year — Calculate YOUR Payment'

jun_11.meta_change: Old: 'Free mortgage calculator for a $X home... See your exact monthly payment' → New: 'What's YOUR monthly payment for a $X home? Get a personalized calculation...'

templates_audited.final_recommendation: SOFTEN — Revert question-based title hooks to descriptive format. Keep meta description improvements for user experience.

jun_11.title_change: Old: '$X Loan: Y% APR Z-Year Loan Calculator 2026 — Free Monthly Payment Tool' → New: '$X Loan: Y% APR Z-Year — What's YOUR Payment?'
jun_11.meta_change: Old: 'Free loan payment calculator...' → New: 'Find out YOUR exact monthly payment...'

templates_audited.final_recommendation: SOFTEN — Revert 'What's YOUR Payment?' to 'Loan Calculator — Free Monthly Payment Tool'. Keep improved meta description.

jun_10.title_change: Old: '$X Investment Return Calculator (Z Year) | ROI & CAGR' → New: '$X for Z Years: See YOUR Investment Returns | ROI & CAGR'

jun_11.meta_change: Removed final value from meta. Old: '...with a final value of $Y' → New: 'Calculate YOUR exact investment return... See CAGR, absolute return, annualized performance, and compare against benchmarks'

templates_audited.final_recommendation: SELECTIVE — Revert title to descriptive. KEEP meta (removing final value from snippet is anti-cannibalization — correct approach).

jun_10.title_change: Old: '$X Compound Interest Calculator (Y% APY) - Z Year | Growth Projection' → New: '$X at Y% for Z Years? See YOUR Compound Growth'

jun_11.meta_change: Old: 'Calculate compound interest on $X at Y% APY' → New: 'How much will $X grow at Y% APY over Z years? Get a personalized compound interest schedule...'

templates_audited.cannibalization_risk: HIGHEST — 5 variants in near-winner list at positions 9.5-22.3
templates_audited.final_recommendation: ROLLBACK — Full rollback to pre-Jun 10 templates. Compound variants have strongest cannibalization evidence.

changes.jun_11: All 4 variant types got question-based meta descriptions with Q&A hooks

templates_audited.cannibalization_risk: HIGH — Global CTR improvements across all thin variants worsen cannibalization
templates_audited.auditor_recommendation: SELECTIVE — Keep only anti-cannibalization changes (investment-return removing final value). Revert Q&A hooks.
templates_audited.final_recommendation: SELECTIVE — KEEP investment-return meta (anti-cannibalization). REVERT Q&A hooks on mortgage, loan, compound variants.

executive_summary: Both days applied CTR/title/meta improvements to ~150-200+ thin tool variant templates. These make thin variants MORE competitive against parent calculators, worsening Phase 20.1 cannibalization problem.
action_required: Rollback/soften tool variant title templates. Keep ONLY the investment-return meta change (removing final value from snippet is genuinely anti-cannibalization).
rollback_status: PENDING — Waiting for Auditor + Technical Guardian agreement
